name: unified_research_synthesizer
description: Synthesize multi-source research into a single Unified Research Document — the copy-ready strategic brief that bridges Research and Brief in RMBC.

product_description.description: What the product/service is, what it does, key claims.

target_audience.description: Who the copy is for — demographics, situation, buying context.

ingredient_research.description: Proof points, studies, clinical data, mechanism details (from ingredient-research).

competitor_data.description: Competitor ads, landing pages, claims, mechanisms, pricing.

customer_feedback.description: Reviews, testimonials, survey responses, support tickets, coaching transcripts.

market_awareness_level.description: Audience awareness: unaware, problem_aware, solution_aware, product_aware, most_aware. Default: auto-detect.
